name: WebMCP
description: Interact with WebMCP-enabled web pages — discover and invoke tools declared in the page's JavaScript/DOM using Chrome automation. Triggers: webmcp, call page tools, browser tools, web tools, interact with page, webmcp-starter.

routing.useWhen: Use when the user wants to interact with a WebMCP-enabled web page, discover or invoke browser-native tools declared in a page's JavaScript, work with the webmcp-starter demo, or build a WebMCP-enabled page. Triggers: webmcp, browser tools, call page tools, web tool invocation, navigator.tools.
routing.dontUseWhen: Do not use for generic browser automation unrelated to WebMCP tool discovery/invocation. Do not use for traditional MCP server setup (use connector configuration instead). Do not use when the user wants to scrape a page without WebMCP tools.
routing.outputs: Discovered tool list from the WebMCP page and/or results from invoked tools, with next-step guidance.
routing.successCriteria: Agent successfully discovers tools registered on the target page and can invoke them by name with correct arguments via browser script execution.

positive: Use WebMCP to call tools on this page
Interact with the webmcp-starter food delivery demo
What WebMCP tools are available on this page?
Call the search_restaurants tool via WebMCP
Help me build a WebMCP-enabled page
negative: Set up an MCP server connector
Automate form filling on a non-WebMCP page
This is a planning discussion, no tool invocation needed
